properties.displayName: This node must be connected to an AI chain. Insert one
properties.name: notice
model
properties.description: The model which will generate the completion. Learn more.

builderHint.propertyHint: Default to claude-sonnet-4-6 (latest Sonnet); use claude-opus-4-7 when the user needs the most capable model. Never use Claude Sonnet 4.5, Claude 3.x, Claude 2, or LEGACY options — those are superseded and are not valid choices. When extended thinking is needed on Opus 4.7+, set Thinking Mode to Adaptive and choose an Effort level. The legacy Manual thinking mode is rejected by Opus 4.7.

properties.description: The model. Choose from the list, or specify an ID. Learn more.

options.name: maxTokensToSample
options.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

options.name: temperature
options.description: Controls randomness: Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.

options.name: topK
options.description: Used to remove "long tail" low probability responses. Defaults to -1, which disables it.

options.name: topP
options.description: Controls diversity via nucleus sampling: 0.5 means half of all likelihood-weighted options are considered. We generally recommend altering this or temperature but not both.

options.name: thinking
options.description: Whether to enable thinking mode for the model

options.name: thinkingBudget
options.description: The maximum number of tokens to use for thinking

options.name: thinkingMode
options.description: How extended thinking should be configured for the model

options.name: Adaptive (Recommended)
options.description: Claude decides how much to think; control with Effort

options.name: Manual (Deprecated)
options.description: Legacy fixed-budget mode; rejected by Opus 4.7+

options.name: thinkingBudget
options.description: Maximum tokens used for thinking. Manual mode is rejected by Opus 4.7+.

options.name: streaming
options.description: Whether the model should stream its response over Server-Sent Events instead of returning a single non-streamed payload. Final output shape is unchanged.
